description: A graphic with 'ARRESTED' in large white block letters across the top over a navy background with a faint DHS seal. Below is a frontal booking-style photograph of a man with short dark hair and a small nose stud, wearing a black shirt. A red band beneath reads 'GHANAIAN NATIONAL', with the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services seal and name at the bottom.
notable_text: ARRESTED; GHANAIAN NATIONAL; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
